channel.title: TradingMapClaw — Weekly Market Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Dual-source verified weekly watchlist observations. Research and education only — not investment advice. WATCHLIST_ONLY.

item.title: Weekly Market Intelligence Brief 2026-W29
item.description: Weekly Market Intelligence Brief 2026-W29. Dual-source verified moves: RKLB -19.3% 5d; META +14.8% 5d; AVGO +11.0% 5d. Research and education only — not investment advice.
